hero.title:
We don't move cargo.
We move decisions.
hero.subtitle: We accompany every operation with strategy, precision and commitment. Because in international trade, every step matters.

about.heading: Experience in every operation
about.description: We are a team specialized in international logistics with extensive experience in coordinating import and export operations. We have a global network of agents and suppliers that allows us to operate with efficiency, agility and total reliability. We focus on providing tailor-made solutions, adapting to the needs of each client and ensuring close follow-up at every stage of the process.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To provide comprehensive logistics solutions in foreign trade, accompanying our clients with a personalized, efficient and transparent service in every operation.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be a leading company in international logistics, recognized for quality of service, commitment and adaptability in a constantly evolving global market.

values.title: Values
values.description: Commitment to the client. Transparency in every operation. Efficiency and proactivity. Professional responsibility. Teamwork. Results orientation.

ctaBanner.title:
We don't move cargo.
We move decisions.
ctaBanner.subtitle: We accompany every operation with strategy, precision and commitment. Because in international trade, every step matters.

services.heading: Solutions for every operation
services.description: We integrate every mode of transport to offer you a complete, efficient and frictionless logistics solution.

items.title: Air Freight
items.description: Fast and secure solutions for urgent or high-value cargo. We coordinate with international airlines with door-to-door tracking.

items.title: Sea Freight
items.description: FCL and LCL operations from and to the world's main ports. Competitive alternatives in costs and transit times.

items.title: Land Transport
items.description: Pickups, deliveries and transfers integrated into the logistics chain with reliable operators, ensuring compliance and traceability.

items.title: Customs Clearance
items.description: Agile, precise management in accordance with current regulations. We anticipate contingencies to ensure efficient release of goods.

items.title: Cargo Insurance
items.description: Coverage designed according to cargo type, route and mode. We work with specialized insurers to reduce risks.

items.title: Certifications
items.description: Comprehensive management of documentation, certifications and permits with the corresponding agencies. We anticipate requirements from the start.

asesorias.title: Consulting
asesorias.description: Your foreign trade department, without internal structure. We integrate as a strategic partner bringing experience, judgment and execution.
items: Assistance to new importers and exporters
Logistics coordination at origin and destination

contact.heading: Start your inquiry
contact.description: We integrate every mode of transport to offer you a complete, efficient and frictionless logistics solution.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: We are ready to help you with your next international trade operation.

terminos.title: Terms & Conditions
terminos.description:
By accessing this website and/or hiring any of the services offered by Intrepid Comercio Exterior (hereinafter, "INTREPID"), the user accepts these Terms and Conditions.

INTREPID provides advisory and coordination services in foreign trade, including specialized consulting, international air, sea and land transport, customs clearance management, cargo insurance, certifications and other services related to import and export operations.

All information published on this site is for informational purposes only and may be changed without prior notice. Quotes, rates, transit times and operational conditions are estimates and will be subject to confirmation at the time the service is contracted, and may vary due to external factors such as carrier rate changes, currency fluctuations, government regulations, space availability, port or airport congestion, customs inspections and other circumstances beyond INTREPID's control.

The client is responsible for providing complete, accurate and truthful information regarding the goods, documentation, declared values and other data necessary for the correct execution of the operation. INTREPID will not be liable for delays, additional costs, penalties or damages arising from incorrect, incomplete or inaccurate information provided by the client.

INTREPID coordinates services provided by specialized third parties, such as carriers, airlines, shipping lines, warehouses, customs brokers, insurance companies and intervening agencies. Consequently, it does not guarantee exact dates of shipment, arrival, release or delivery of the goods, and will not be liable for breaches, delays or contingencies attributable to such third parties.

Cargo insurance contracting will be optional, unless expressly agreed otherwise. Coverages, exclusions, conditions and any indemnifications will be subject to the terms established by the corresponding insurance company.

INTREPID will perform its services with due professional diligence, but will not be liable for indirect losses, loss of profits, loss of business opportunities, operational interruptions or any other consequential damages resulting from circumstances beyond its reasonable control.

All contents of this website, including texts, images, logos, designs and informational material, are the property of INTREPID or are used under proper authorization, and their total or partial reproduction is prohibited without prior written authorization.

Personal data provided by users will be used exclusively for commercial, administrative and operational purposes related to the services offered, and will be treated confidentially in accordance with applicable law.

INTREPID may modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Modifications will become effective upon publication on the website.

Use of this site and hiring any of the offered services implies full acceptance of these Terms and Conditions. Any dispute arising from their interpretation or application shall be governed by the laws of the Argentine Republic and submitted to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires.

politicas.title: Privacy Policy
politicas.description:
At Intrepid Comercio Exterior we value and protect the privacy of our clients, suppliers, users and visitors. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store and protect the information provided to us through our website, contact forms, emails and other communication channels.

The personal information we may collect includes, among other data, first and last name, company, position, email address, phone number, business address and any other information voluntarily provided by the user when requesting information, quotes or hiring our services.

The data collected will be used for the following purposes:

Responding to inquiries and information requests.
Preparing and sending commercial quotes.
Managing foreign trade and international logistics operations.
Coordinating services with suppliers, carriers, agents and intervening agencies.
Maintaining commercial contact with clients and potential clients.
Fulfilling legal, regulatory and administrative obligations.
Improving the quality of our services and the browsing experience on the website.

Intrepid Comercio Exterior is committed to treating the received information confidentially and implementing reasonable security measures to protect it against unauthorized access, loss, alteration or improper disclosure.

Personal information may only be shared when necessary for the provision of the contracted services, compliance with legal obligations or at the request of competent authorities. Under no circumstances will we sell or transfer personal data to third parties for purposes unrelated to our activity without the appropriate consent.

Our website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve the browsing experience, analyze site usage and optimize our content and services. The user may configure their browser to reject or delete such cookies, although this may affect some site functionalities.

Users may request access, updating, rectification or deletion of their personal data at any time by contacting us through the channels published on the website.

Intrepid Comercio Exterior may update this Privacy Policy when necessary to adapt it to legal, technological or commercial changes. Modifications will take effect from their publication on the website.

By using this website or providing personal information to Intrepid Comercio Exterior, the user declares that they have read and accepted this Privacy Policy.
